headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk (only reputational or minor compliance costs possible) — Adani Power secures 2500 MW supply contract from MSEDCL, reinforcing operational scale but with low ESG materiality.
what_matters: BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks triggered for disclosure, but no new deadlines or penalties.
No P/E compression or margin erosion expected; revenue at risk is unchanged.
No impact on cost of capital or bond spreads; no FII outflow risk triggered.
